query:
SELECT o.id, o.event_type, o.payload, o.created_at
            FROM outbox.outbox_events o
            LEFT JOIN orchestration.runs r ON o.payload ->> 'runId' = r.id
            WHERE o.id > $1
              AND (
                  $2 = o.payload ->> 'sessionId'
                  OR $2 = o.payload -> 'message' ->> 'sessionId'
                  OR $2 = r.session_id
              )
            ORDER BY o.id ASC
            LIMIT $3
